name: browse_index
description: Iterate over all records in an Algolia index without search ranking. Returns records in batches using a cursor for pagination. Useful for exporting entire indexes, data synchronization, or processing all objects when relevance ordering is not needed.

parameters.name: indexName
parameters.description: The name of the index to browse.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor from previous response to fetch the next batch. Omit for the first request.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Optional filter expression to browse only a subset of records.

parameters.name: attributesToRetrieve
parameters.description: List of attributes to return for each record.
